about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Digital Transformation Architect — I Understand & I Build
about.story: My career started with writing code and evolved all the way to running companies as CEO. This unique experience allows me to speak both the language of technology and the language of business. I believe real digital transformation doesn't happen with slides and consulting alone — it needs someone who designs the strategy and ensures its execution.
